context: Name of the to be translated language

source_string: Relieve a Blaze of its rod
Destroy a Ghast with a fireball

translation: Koristi "@a" kako bi locirao sve igrače
Koristi "@p" kako bi locirao najbližeg igrača

source_string: Must be an opped player in creative mode
translation: Mora biti unapređen igrač u kreativnom modu

source_string: Command blocks are not enabled on this server
translation: Komandni Blokovi nisu omogućeni na ovom serveru
Koristi "@r" kako bi locirao nasumičnog igrača

source_string: Note! When you sign the book, it will no longer be editable.
translation: Pazi! Kad se knjiga jednom potpiše, nemoguće je kasnije menjati sadržaj.

source_string: Height limit for building is %s blocks

translation: Ne mogu poslati poruku na četu

source_string: Are you sure you want to open the following website?
translation: Da li ste sigurni da želite da otvorite ovaj sajt?

source_string: Do you want to open this link or copy it to your clipboard?
translation: Da li želite da otvorite ovaj link ili da ga kopirate?

source_string: Never open links from people that you don't trust!
translation: Nikad ne otvaraj linkove ljudi kojima ne veruješ!

source_string: You have entered an invalid IP address or a player that is not online
translation: Neispravna IP adresa ili nepoznat igrač

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a maximum of %2$d
Custom bossbar [%1$s] has no players currently online
translation: Prilagođeni bos-bar %s trenutno nema onlajn igrača

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a value of %2$d

translation: Ni jedan blok se nije klonirao

source_string: Could not de-op (permission level too high): %s
translation: Ništa se nije promenilo. Igrač nije operator
%s napravljen da nije više operator servera
Ni jedan blok se nije popunio
Režim igranja igrača "%s" je postavljen na "%s"

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, %3$s, %4$s (%5 blocks away)
The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, (y?), %3$s (%4 blocks away)
Could not op (already op or higher): %s
translation: Ništa se nije promenilo. Igrač je već operator
Nije bilo moguće započeti lokalnu igru

source_string: Function and script files have been reloaded.
There are no objectives on the scoreboard
There are no tracked players on the scoreboard

translation: Postavi tačku reinkarnacije na %s, %s, %s [%s] u %s za %s

source_string: Target either already has the tag or has too many tags
translation: Meta ili već ima oznaku ili ima previše oznaka

source_string: Target does not have this tag
Failed to connect to the server

translation: podešavanja i ne može se poništiti.
Dodatna napredna podešavanja (samo za stručne igrače!)

source_string: Alternatively, here's some we made earlier!
translation: Inače, evo nekih koje smo napravili ranije!

source_string: Want to share your preset with someone? Use the below box!
translation: Želite da podelite šablon sa nekim? Koristite polje ispod!

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling anvil

translation: %1$s je pogođen(a) strelom od strane %2$s koristeći %3$s

source_string: %1$s walked into a cactus whilst trying to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s je ušetao u kaktus dok je pokušavao da pobegne od %2$s
%1$s se udavio dok je pokušavao da pobegne od %2$s

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling block

translation: %1$s je pogođen(a) vatrenom loptom od strane "%2$s"
%1$s je pogođen(a) vatrenom loptom od strane %2$s koristeći %3$s
%1$s je ubijen od strane %2$s koristeći magiju
%1$s upao u vatru tokom borbe sa %2$s
%1$s je pokušao/la da pliva u lavi

source_string: %1$s tried to swim in lava to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s je pokušao/la da pliva u lavi bežeći od %2$s

source_string: %1$s was burnt to a crisp whilst fighting %2$s
%1$s was skewered by a falling stalactite
translation: %1$s je postao ražnjić od strane padajućeg stalaktita

source_string: %1$s was doomed to fall by %2$s using %3$s
translation: %1$s je osuđen(a) na pad od strane %2$s koristeći %3$s

source_string: %1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s
%1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s using %3$s
translation: %1$s je pao previsoko i dokrajčio ga je %2$s sa %3$s

source_string: Are you sure you want to quit?
translation: Jesi li si siguran da želiš izađi?

source_string: This demo will last five game days, do your best!
translation: Ova proba trajaće pet Minecraft dana. Srećno!

source_string: You have passed your fifth day, use F2 to save a screenshot of your creation
translation: Prošlo je pet dana, pritisni %s za slikanje svog umeća.

source_string: This demo will last 5 in-game days (about 1 hour and 40 minutes of real time). Check the achievements for hints! Have fun!
translation: Ova demonstracija će trajati 5 Minecraft dana (oko 1 sat i 40 minuta stvarnog vremena). Pogledaj napretke za savete. Uživaj!

source_string: Use %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s and the mouse to move around
The demo time has expired, buy the game to continue or start a new world!
translation: Probni period je istekao. Kupi igru kako bi nastavio ili otvori novi svet!

source_string: Are you sure you want to lock the difficulty of this world? This will set this world to always be %1$s, and you will never be able to change that again.
translation: Jeste li sigurni da hoćete da zaključate težinu u ovom svetu? To znači da će ovaj svet uvek biti %1$s, i vi nikada više nećete moći to da promenite.

source_string: You were kicked from the game
You were kicked from the game:

translation: Sesija nevažeća (Pokušajte restartovati igru i pokretač)

source_string: The authentication servers are currently down for maintenance.
translation: Serveri za potvrdu trenutno nisu dostupni.

context: Label on the first tile button in the servers grid

source_string: Are you sure you want to remove this server?
translation: Želiš li da ukloniš ovaj server?
